body_transformation: The compact rounded body now bears molten gold armor plating with charcoal black heat-cracks, its pale cream limb accents replaced by crimson red scales that glow faintly at the joints. The curled spiral tail tip transforms into a flickering flame-tipped appendage with ember-scaled texture, while the dark gray body shading shifts to molten gold patterns that pulse with internal heat. The rounded head retains its shape but gains a textured, magma-cracked skin surface with amber glow accents around the eyes. All structural elements remain intact, with fire-themed textures layered precisely over the original silhouette.
signature_feature: Flame-tipped tail: ember-scaled armor plating with glowing crimson fissures and molten gold trails.
